unit.note: grade plugin hermetic suite; 12 empirical deselected

integration.note: -m empirical launch gate: 5 calibration in band + ordering + 2 edge robust; 4 ci-only skipped

surface_verification.justification: Cold-repo projector calibration (shipwright-grade library + CLI); no web/UI surface. The E2E verification IS the empirical calibration gate: `-m empirical` replays 7 real-OSS fixtures offline (5 calibration in band + ordering, 2 edge robust), a live `--refresh` re-recorded all 7 over the real network+gh, and `grade.py <URL>` graded ky+babel live (also exercising the --depth fix). Dogfood monorepo re-graded A 100 (authoritative).

behaviors.behavior: matrix-named github-actions check counts (CI-system app slug)
legacy Travis StatusContext counts by CI-system name
denominator = examinable merged PRs; PR-head-commit fallback for on:pull_request CI
0-passing scores LOW with test infra, n/a without (has_test_infra=test_files AND has_ci)
network PR-association ratio parse (+ none paths) + tiering
projector maps ratio -> events_with_provenance; round HALF-UP off the 0.5 cap + clamp
self-referential feature filter (+ detector-mislabel robustness) suppresses framework-own routes
behaviors.evidence: test_framework_own_source_is_self_referential, test_application_route_is_genuine, test_mislabelled_framework_still_suppressed_by_path_package, test_well_run_app_requirement_surface_survives_filter PASSED + committed pallets/flask fixture frs_total=0

behaviors.behavior: dogfood: authoritative grade never runs the projection (monorepo A stays)
behaviors.evidence: test_authoritative.py::test_authoritative_grade_never_runs_the_projection PASSED + live monorepo grade A 100 authoritative

behaviors.behavior: manifest 2-tier well-run>deprecated, band-ordered; real repos in band + ordering holds

behaviors.evidence: covered empirically by the live --refresh of all 7 non-ci-only fixtures
